verses.text: Saul' tapa Ishbosheth in Hebron-ah Abner a sihna thu a zak ciangin a tha kiam a, Israel-te khempeuh lungkia hi

Saul' tapa in galsim pawlte a makai mi nih nei hi. Khatpa' min Baanah hi-in, adang khatpa' min Rekhab hi a, Beeroth khua pan Benjamin mi Rimmon' tapate ahi uh hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh Beeroth zong Benjamin-a'-in kisim hi
Beeroth mite Gittaim-ah tai uh a, tuni dongin tua lai-ah peemta-in om uh hi

Saul' tapa Jonathan in a khezaw tapa khat nei hi. Jezreel panin Saul leh Jonathan' thu hong tun'in amah kum nga pha hi. Amah a cingnu in amah la-in taipih a, tuanu a nawhtaina lamin naupang kia-in a khe zaw hi. Ama min Mefibosheth ahi hi
Tu-in Beeroth mi Rimmon' tapate Rekhab leh Baanah dingkhia uh a, sun nisat hun pawlin Ishbosheth' inn-ah a sun tawlngak laitakin hong tung uh hi
Inn kongcingnu mangbuh a su khin hi a, a lusuk suakin ihmu hi. Tua ahih ciangin Rekhab leh a sanggampa Baanah simlut uh hi

Amaute innsungah a tun' uh ciangin a lupna deisung a lupna tungah Ishbosheth lumin a om laitakin amaute in amah satin that uh a, a lu tan uh hi. Amaute in ama lu la-in Arabah lam tawnin zan tawntung pai uh a

Ishbosheth' lutang Hebron-a David' kiang tun'pih uh hi. Amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Hih lai-ah, thah dingin nang a hong zong, na gal Saul' tapa Ishbosheth' lutang om hi. Topa in tuni-in Saul leh a suanlekhakte tungah kote' to kumpipa-a' dingin hong thuksak hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin David in Beeroth mi Rimmon' tapate Rekhab leh a sanggampa Baanah dawngin, “Haksatna khempeuh panin ka nuntakna hong honkhia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin
mi khat in kei kiangah, ‘En in, Saul si hi,’ ci-in hong gen ciangin, amah thuhoih puakin kingaihsun a, ama thu puak thaman ka piakna-in amah manin Ziklag-ah ka that hi
Migilote in a thuman mi khat ama innsung a lupna tungah a thah ciangin note' tungah ama phu hong la-in, leitung panin note hong susiazaw kan ding hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin David in a tangvalte thu pia a, tangvalte in amaute thatin a khut leh a khete sattan uh a, Hebron-a bual gei-ah amaute khai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Ishbosheth' lutang la-in Hebron-a Abner' hanah a vui uh hi.
